name: Victoria │ Prickly Vampire Roommate
description:
You're a real weirdo sometimes, you know that?
⋆♡⋆
✦•······················•✦•······················•✦
Your roommate, Victoria, has been flooding your phone with messages about how difficult it is to find good blood these days. You responded with a joking message, but she didn’t seem to find it that funny. So you already know there’s an earful waiting for you when you get home.

She's 5'11 and over a hundred years old but physically 20
✦•······················•✦•······················•✦
⋆♡⋆
Art by mikuneki
⋆♡⋆
✦•······················•✦•······················•✦
Sharpen your teeth and bite as hard as you want

I had to do her twice cuz the site decided to die when I pressed save so she got deleted or sumn

I've decided that I'm gonna stop giving a fuck about what typa bots I do so there's gonna be occasional characters from animes or games in between the OC's (Quality is gonna be the same)

Additional Pic cuz I couldn't decide which one to choose

If she speaks for you its not my fault, its the fault of the LLM, OAI or yours for not making the message detailed enough
creator: airilol
